text:
In the first scene, I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with quiet reflection. The glass wall separates me from an engaged group, as if I stand on the edge of collective inquiry. The figure nearby, absorbed in their device, seems both present and absent—a modern paradox, evoking thoughts of connection and alienation in shared spaces.

In the second scene, I am curious and awakened. Vivid colors and bold text signal innovation and research. The exhibits prompt me to ponder our evolving relationship with knowledge, technology, and each other. There is excitement here—a feeling of being on the threshold of discovery, where thought becomes experience.
